isolation.sourceKFX: REFERENCE/kindle_device_new/1984_ The Definitive Dystopian Classic on Totalitarian Power (Authorized Orwell Edition)_B003JTHWKU.kfx

assertions.title: 1984 produces 0 text diffs

steps.action: Convert 1984 KFX to EPUB using kindle-helper convert
steps.observed: Conversion succeeded with DRM decryption (3 sources, 1 decrypted + 2 sidecar). 462 referenced positions failed to locate. Output: /tmp/1984_go.epub

steps.action: Unzip Go output and Calibre reference EPUBs
steps.observed: Both EPUBs extracted successfully. File lists are identical (no missing or extra files).

steps.action: Compare all text files after stripping dcterms:modified timestamps
steps.observed: 15 differing text files out of 47 total text files (32 matching). Differing files: c1HY.xhtml, c1J7.xhtml, c1K4.xhtml, c1KF.xhtml, c1MS.xhtml, c1NA.xhtml, c1RU.xhtml, c2R.xhtml, c3E.xhtml, c9.xhtml, cDT.xhtml, cP.xhtml, nav.xhtml, stylesheet.css, toc.ncx

evidence.sampleDifferences: Go output shows class naming differences (e.g., 'class_sN' vs 'figure_sN-0'), missing class attributes on <a> tags within headings, and CSS class naming/deduplication differences. Also 462 failed position references logged during conversion.

assertions.issues: 15 of 47 text files differ between Go output and Calibre reference. Primary differences include: (1) CSS class naming conventions differ (Go uses 'class_sN' where Calibre uses 'figure_sN-0'), (2) missing class attributes on <a> tags inside headings, (3) stylesheet class name differences, (4) nav/toc ordering differences.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-CROSS-002 FAILED. 1984 conversion produces 15 differing text files (out of 47 total) against Calibre reference. Expected 0 diffs. Evidence diffs saved to mission evidence directory.
